name: nguyen-tat-thanh-grade-manager
description: Monorepo scripts for running backend, ai engine, and frontend together

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,AI,FRONTEND -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:ai: if exist ai-engine\venv\Scripts\python.exe (cd ai-engine && venv\Scripts\python -m uvicorn main:app --port 5000 --reload) else (cd ai-engine && ..\.venv\Scripts\python -m uvicorn main:app --port 5000 --reload)
